sections.paragraph: m. a male, as being he through whom the memorial of parents is continued [but see Thes. and Ges. cor. where this reason is omitted], 2Sa 8:18. It is used of men, Gen 1:27 5:2 17:10 , seq.; 34:15 , seq.; and of animals also, Gen 7:3, , 16 Exo 12:5. Plur. זְכָרִים Ezr 8:4, seq. Compare זָכַר Niphal No. 2, and זָכוּר. (Arab. ذَكَرُ, Syr. ܕܶܟܪܐܳ id., the former is also used to signify membrum virile.) [For the etymology, see added remark on זָכַר.]
